prompts.text: Go to https://www.amazon.com/ and find one stainless steel water bottle with Prime shipping and rating >= 4 stars. Add exactly one item to cart and stop before checkout confirmation. Task theme: amazon single item purchase.

Go to https://www.amazon.com/ and find one wireless ergonomic mouse with Prime shipping and rating >= 4 stars. Add exactly one item to cart and stop before checkout confirmation. Task theme: amazon single item purchase.
